title: goniopteris poiteana
intro: Goniopteris poiteana, also known as the Poiteau's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Goniopteris poiteana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
